title: bidens ostruthioides var. typica
intro: Bidens ostruthioides var. typica, also known as Biddens or Swamp Marigold, is a variety of flowering plant native to Australia, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Bidens ostruthioides var. typica include the potential relief from fever, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
